description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a large, edge-to-edge display on the front, featuring minimal bezels and a centered punch-hole front camera. The back is sleek and smooth, finished in a light gray color, and houses a vertically aligned triple camera array in the top left corner, accompanied by a small flash. The sides are slim and metallic, with subtle button placements visible along the right edge. The device appears to be constructed primarily from glass and metal, giving it a premium and durable feel. The overall design is minimalist and contemporary, suitable for everyday urban use. The screen displays a colorful abstract wallpaper with blue, green, and purple hues.
description: A sleek, modern smartphone with a large edge-to-edge display, triple rear cameras, and a smooth light gray finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large display with minimal bezels and a centered punch-hole camera.
description_view_1: Right side view highlighting the slim profile and visible side buttons.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the triple camera array in the top left and a smooth, light gray surface.
description_view_3: Left side view showing the slim metallic edge with no visible buttons.
attribute_brand_logo: Embossed Samsung text centered on the back, subtle and matching the gray color.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays an abstract wallpaper with blue, green, and purple brushstroke patterns; no icons, widgets, or notifications are visible.
attribute_camera_placement: Triple camera array vertically aligned in the top left corner on the back, with a small flash adjacent to the cameras.
attribute_button_layout: Physical buttons are present on the right edge, likely including a power button and volume rocker, slim and elongated in shape.
